given: a root component stores count in state
when: the setter is called with an updater function
then: state is preserved across renders and the UI updates

given: a root component is mounted with initial state
when: the setter receives the current value again

given: multiple child components each create local state
when: one child updates after a keyed list change
then: only that child state changes and each child keeps its own slot

given: useState is called outside any component render
then: the runtime throws a render-phase hook error
